name: node-ini
title: node-ini
summary: ini format parser and serializer for Node.js
description:
ini format parser and serializer for Node.js
Read, manipulate and write ini files.
Sections are treated as nested objects.
Items before the first heading are saved on the object directly.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side javascript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-ini because ini format parser and serializer for Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-ini as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-ini with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-ini --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
